news.t: Golden Opportunity With Golden State Munis

overview.description: The American Century California Municipal Bond ETF (CATF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that mainly invests in municipal securities of any maturity, with interest income that are exempt from federal and California state income tax. CATF was launched on Jul 16, 2024 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Golden Opportunity With Golden State Munis
data.text: California isn't just the largest state by population. It's the largest issuer of municipal bonds, presenting its residents and fixed income investors all over the country with an array of opportuniti...
